vms.name: management
vms.notes: Fleet controller. Runs the fleet orchestrator, admin console, and fleet-level heartbeats to the owner.

vms.name: worker
vms.notes: Background worker. Runs scheduled tasks. Heartbeats to management. Cross-watches other VMs.

vms.name: laboratory
vms.notes: Main dashboard host. Finance app + database. Worker runs the A1 capacity lottery.
